description_long: This is a two-story detached house with a gable roof, constructed primarily from light gray brick and featuring black roof shingles. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a small porch, steps, and a dark-colored door, flanked by symmetrical windows. The property is surrounded by a low hedge and wooden fencing, with a paved driveway leading to a detached garage on one side. The landscaping includes several mature trees and a small garden area, as well as a backyard patio with outdoor furniture. Large windows and a sunroom extension are visible on the side, suggesting a blend of traditional and modern architectural elements.
description: A two-story gray brick house with a gable roof, front porch, detached garage, and landscaped yard with trees and hedges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway with a red car, symmetrical windows, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sunroom extension, backyard patio with furniture, and wooden fencing enclosing the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, detached garage, and several trees within the fenced yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, rear entry, and additional garden and driveway details.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with some large side windows and a sunroom extension
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with small porch, steps, and minimal decorative elements
